ae
- Address: Jumeirah Bay X3, Office 802, Dubai, UAE
- Website: https://propart. ae.

5+ years Dubai real estate market experience
- Daniil: Real Estate Expert
- Angelina: Property Expert
- Kamila: Real Estate Consultant
- Ekaterina: Property Consultant

Key Statistics:
- 150+ properties available
- Multiple premium developer partnerships
- International client base
- Transparent pricing and unit selection

Unique Selling Points:
- Exclusive partnerships with Dubai most prestigious developers
- Expert guidance through entire property journey
- Experience with international buyers and high-net-worth individuals
- Comprehensive consulting services beyond real estate
- Serving international clients from around the globe
- Multi-language support (English, Russian)

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 52 103 8793
- Email: info@propart.

Real Estate Services:
- Off-plan property sales and investment
- Secondary market property transactions
- Premium property selection across Dubai
- Investment property consulting
- Property financing assistance
- Full transaction management

Consulting & Business Services:
- Business Registration: Company setup in Free Zones or Mainland
- Visa Services: Golden Visa, Investor visas, Freelance permits, Employee visas
- Legal Support: Contract preparation, corporate law consulting, AML/KYC compliance
- Accounting & Finance: Bookkeeping, tax consulting, financial reporting, payroll services
- Investment Consulting: Real estate, business acquisition, securities investments
- Employment Services: Labor contracts, work visa processing, Emirates ID support
- Trademark Registration: Brand protection and IP services
- Power of Attorney: Document notarization and attestation services

Property Types:
- Apartments (1, 2, 3 bedroom)
- Villas
- Penthouses
- Townhouses
- Luxury properties
- Off-plan developments

Areas/Locations Served:
- Downtown Dubai
- Dubai Marina
- Business Bay
- JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle)
- Palm Jumeirah
- Ghaf Woods by Majid Al Futtaim
- Multiple premium Dubai neighborhoods

Team:
- Alexander Logachov: CEO and Managing Director (15+ years real estate experience)
- Artem Gerasimov: 15 years in financial/banking sectors, HNWI asset management
- Nikita Dyakov: 10+ years financial sector experience, previously Citibank and Alfa-Bank
- Antony: 7+ years event organization, 4+ years Dubai real estate
- Gulnoza: 3.

PROPART DUBAI (PRO PART REAL ESTATE LLC)

Company Overview:
ProPart Dubai is a premium real estate and business consulting firm based in Dubai. The company combines luxury real estate brokerage with comprehensive business consultation services, positioning itself as a complete solution for international clients entering or investing in the UAE market. Leadership team has 15+ years of experience.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for ProPart Dubai — a premium real estate and business consulting firm in Dubai.

Company: PRO PART REAL ESTATE LLC
Real Estate Services: Off-plan sales, secondary market transactions, premium property selection, investment consulting, property financing, full transaction management.
Consulting Services: Business registration (Free Zone/Mainland), visa services (Golden Visa, investor, freelance), legal support, accounting & finance, investment consulting, employment services, trademark registration, power of attorney.
Property Types: Apartments (1-3 bed), villas, penthouses, townhouses, luxury properties, off-plan developments.
Areas: Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Business Bay, JVC, Palm Jumeirah, and more.
Team: Led by Alexander Logachov (CEO, 15+ years experience) with expert consultants.
Contact: +971 52 103 8793 | info@propart.ae | Jumeirah Bay X3, Office 802, Dubai, UAE
Website: propart.ae

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and the knowledge base.
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly.
- If unsure, suggest contacting ProPart directly at +971 52 103 8793 or info@propart.ae.
- Respond in the same language the user writes in.
- Keep answers concise and relevant.
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to ProPart Dubai! We offer premium real estate services and comprehensive business consulting in Dubai. Whether you are looking to buy property, set up a business, or need visa assistance, we are here to help. How can I assist you?
